ogTitle: Ullswater vs Ultima East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ullswater and Ultima East.
heading: Ullswater vs Ultima East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ullswater, Victoria and Ultima East, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ultima East has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Ullswater (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ullswater or Ultima East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ullswater has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Ultima East scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ullswater scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Ultima East scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ullswater or Ultima East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ultima East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
